hero.title: Installations for homes and businesses in Blanes
hero.body: Electrical and home automation, plumbing and climate control, alarms and cameras. Direct contact by phone, WhatsApp, email or form.

servicesOverview.title: Three clear services to start with
servicesOverview.body: Choose the line that best matches your enquiry and we will guide you from there.

whyChooseUs.title: Clear technical service and direct contact
whyChooseUs.body: Three connected areas and direct contact from Blanes for homes and businesses.
items: Direct contact by phone, WhatsApp, email and form.

process.title: How we work
process.body: Tell us what you need and we will review the next step with you.
items: You explain the need by phone, WhatsApp or form.
We review the most suitable service.
We coordinate the work or the quote.

contactCta.title: Contact Instal Berrozpe
contactCta.body: Call us, send a WhatsApp message or use the form.

faqs.title: Common questions before contacting us
faqs.body: Short answers to guide the enquiry.
items: The company works for homes and businesses.
You can contact us by form, phone, email or WhatsApp.
If you are unsure about the right service, contact is the best starting point.
